policy.note: Validated against current-packet wrapper/provider probes. Prefer this adapter for the next clean packet rerun.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.rationale: Default route stalled; Baseten completed all 12 tasks with no no-answer rows.

z-ai/glm-5.2.rationale: Default route exhausted hidden completion tokens; Wafer completed all 12 tasks with no no-answer rows.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.rationale: Default route produced no-answer rows; Tinfoil recovered visible answers on all probed failed rows and got 2/3 correct.

minimax/minimax-m3.rationale: Completed packet reliably with no no-answer rows.

xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.rationale: Only Xiaomi route exists. Larger cap on streaming recovered important no-answer rows, including a unique hle_bio_0 rescue. Slow/expensive but currently additive.

nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b.rationale: Completed packet reliably with no no-answer rows and one unique HLE rescue.

google/gemma-4-31b-it.rationale: DeepInfra remains fastest reliable Gemma route from prior provider probes.
